products: Al Jazirah Falcon Company specializes in cooling, air conditioning, and home appliances of all types. The company owns five factories and operates more than fifteen showrooms across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It is structured into three main sectors, each distinguished by its area of specialization. The Industrial Sector is responsible for the manufacturing of the company’s products, such as cooling and air conditioning systems. This sector encompasses factories, production lines, technology, research and development (R&D), and quality assurance. The Commercial Sector is dedicated to all business and commercial operations, including the sale of products under our own brands as well as authorized agencies. It covers marketing, sales, product distribution, management of the dealer network, and the strengthening of commercial relationships with customers and partners. The Contracting Sector focuses on mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (MEP) projects, in addition to facility management and after-sales services, providing comprehensive and reliable technical solutions tailored to client needs.

products: Al Manar Pipes Factory Company is a leading manufacturer of high-quality uPVC, HDPE, and PPR pipes and fittings. Committed to advancing infrastructure development both in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and globally, we meet the evolving demands of the construction, industrial, and infrastructure sectors. Carrying our brand MANARCO, our product range includes uPVC Pipes and Fittings for potable water systems, irrigation, drainage, and electrical applications, HDPE Pipes and Fittings which are perfect for water, gas, telecommunications, and industrial applications, and PPR Pipes and Fittings for both hot and cold-water systems. Our products are approved and certified by leading entities in Saudi Arabia, including SASO, NWC, NEOM, Red Sea Global, STC, Dawiyat, and MODON. These certifications reflect our unwavering commitment to maintaining the highest standards of quality, safety, and compliance in every product we manufacture.

products: Established in 2010 as a joint venture with Sanabeh Suspended Ceiling Factory—an industry leader since 2001—Jawdah Industrial Co. Ltd. has built a strong reputation for client satisfaction, quality control, and timely project delivery. Over the years, we have expanded vigorously into the fields of sub-contracting and contracting, securing numerous contracts from both local and international clients thanks to our proven time management and quality assurance standards. Our product portfolio includes: • Metal ceilings • Gypsum boards and tiles • Suspension systems • Access panels • PVC films • Sandwich panels • Stainless steel products As a group of companies with a manufacturing legacy spanning three generations, we specialize in producing and supplying high-quality suspended ceiling systems for interior decoration. This long-standing experience has given us deep insight into both the products and industrial processes involved. Today, Jawdah Industrial Co. Ltd. is recognized as one of the largest and most reliable suppliers in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia (KSA). We strive to exceed expectations in every aspect—product quality, supply consistency, warranty standards, manufacturing techniques, installation ease, and competitive pricing. We are committed to continuous improvement, constantly upgrading our manufacturing and supply systems to remain at the forefront of the industry. Our customer-centric approach and proven track record of successful projects underline our mission: “Delivering quality you can trust, with performance you can rely on.” Choosing Jawdah means choosing excellence, durability, and unmatched functional performance.
